data.body: AC correction: acceptance criterion 3 was drafted asserting runner=='code-review-gate' (a pre-verification guess). Live verification showed the ENABLED four-pass code-review gate runs via, and reports, the pydantic_ai runner — so the empirically-correct and intent-faithful assertion is runner=='pydantic_ai' (the test's original value; its only real bug was the capability being off by default). Updating AC3 to match the verified behavior.
